📅 Year-End Closing — Financial Year Management
🔒 Year Close Karein
Year Close karne se kya hoga:
✅ Current year ka data lock ho jaayega (read-only)
✅ Sab pending bills carry forward ho jaayenge naye year mein
✅ Sab counter reset honge (Bill no, Challan no, etc.) naye year ke liye
✅ Stock / inventory carry forward hoga
✅ Profit & Loss current year ka calculate ho jaayega
⚠️ Year close karne ke baad undo nahi ho sakta
📚 Closed Years History

Office Expense Details (Rent / Bijli / Internet etc.)

Job Work Details (Mill Print / Digital Print / Stitching)
⚠️ Note: Mill Print, Digital Print aur Stitching — ye sab Job Work category mein hain, Office Expense mein NAHI. Agar Hiya Fashion ko payment Kotak Bank se diya hai toh Payment Mode mein "🏦 Kotak Bank (Transfer)" choose karein.

💰
Credit Balance kab banta hai?
Return se Credit: Jab customer itna maal return kare ki uska baaki ₹0 ho jaye aur phir bhi return bacha — toh wo credit ban jaata hai.
Overpayment se Credit: Agar customer ne zyada payment di to baaki credit ban jaata hai.
Adjust Karein: Har customer card par "Adjust Karein" button se credit ko agle sale ke saath adjust kar sakte hain.

      Entry Edit Karein
      
    

    

      
      
      

        

        

      

      

      

      

        

          
        

        

      

      

        
        
      

      

        Items ki quantity/rate changes ke liye pehli entry delete karke naya entry karein. Yahan sirf header details edit ho sakti hain.
      

      

        
        
      

    

  






Deleted! 4 payments removed.







  

    

      

        
✏️ Party Name Fix / Merge

        
Galat naam se save hue bills ko sahi naam pe merge karein

      

      
    


    

      📌 Kaise use karein: "Purana naam" mein wo naam likhein jo bills mein galat save hua hai (jaise "Kanha Tex Fab"). "Naya/Sahi naam" mein sahi naam likhein (jaise "Kanha Tex"). Save karne par sab bills us party ke naam update ho jayenge.
    


    

      
      
    


    

      
      
      
💡 Ya neeche se existing party naam select karein:
